5.question_text: Choose the correct word. The sun rises in the ______.
Choose the correct plural form of 'Book'.
Which word is an action word?

6.question_text: Select the correct past tense form. I _____ to school yesterday.
Identify the pronoun. 'She completed the work.'

7.question_text: Identify the adjective. 'The clever boy solved the problem.'

8.question_text: What is one benefit of regular exercise?
Choose the correct reported speech. Riya said, 'I am happy.'

options.option_text: Riya said that I am happy.
Riya said that she was happy.
The project was completed by the students.
The students are completing the project.

9.question_text: Identify the subordinate clause. 'Although it was raining, the match continued.'
Choose the correct transformation. 'No other metal is as useful as iron.'

options.option_text: Iron is more useful than any other metal.
Iron is less useful than other metals.
